name: Spiders (Noodle Candy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the cashews and break them in half.
2. Melt the chocolate and butterscotch chips in a double boiler.
3. Remove from heat and mix in the cashews and noodles.
4. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto waxed paper.
5. Refrigerate until set.
Source: Cookbook USA
